title: ehretia monopyrena
intro: Ehretia monopyrena, also known as the White Ironwood or Ehretia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ehretia monopyrena include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Ehretia monopyrena include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
